video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG guild arcane library, feminine young adult frontline adventurer in short guild cloak and reinforced leather armor, and masculine mage with layered blue robes and neat gloves; Natsu Ashbell and Natsu Dawncrest raise their hands in a synchronized two-person harmless spell practice, glowing soft mana ribbons swirling around them, readable cooperative body motion, warm wood interior, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous arcane library shot; Natsu Dawncrest adjusts their hand position and the soft mana ribbons stabilize between both characters, floating books in the background settle into place, calm teamwork, warm wood lighting, no combat harm, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly cooperative and non-sexual, focusing on magical teamwork. The environment is a standard fantasy library setting with no harmful or suggestive content.

timeline_story.selection_reason: Synchronizing magic to stabilize floating books caused by the residual mana anomaly in the library.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborative success in stabilizing the library's magical disturbance.
Successful arcane synchronization builds mutual respect.
